summaryAm: እንስሳት የምግብ ዛፍን ስም ለማስታወስ በመተባበር የሚማሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ጥበብን ማዳመጥ እና ማስታወስ ማኅበረሰብን ይረዳል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በደረቅ ወቅት ሣሩ ቀነሰ፣ ፍሬዎችም በጣም ጥቂት ሆኑ። እንስሳቱ በአንድነት “ምግብ የት እናገኛለን?” ብለው ተጠየቁ።
pages.textEn: In the dry season, the animals wondered where they could find food.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gentle animals gathering in a dry but warm landscape, child-friendly style.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጥበበኛ አያት ለእንስሳቱ ስለ ልዩ ዛፍ ነገራቸው። “የዛፉን ስም ካስታወሳችሁ፣ ፍሬውን በደስታ ይካፈላል” አለ።
pages.textEn: A wise elder told them about a special tree with fruit to share.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A wise elder speaking kindly to animals under a shaded tree.

pages.textAm: ስሙ ትንሽ ረጅም ነበር፣ ስለዚህ እንስሳቱ በቀስታ ደጋገሙት። ዝሆኑ በዝቅተኛ ድምፅ፣ ወፉም በቀላል ዜማ አለችው።
pages.textEn: The name was long, so the animals repeated it together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Animals repeating a tree name together like a gentle song.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ ጥንቸል “እኔ እሄዳለሁ” አለ። ጓደኞቹም ስሙን በዜማ አስተምረውት በመንገድ ላይ እንዲደግመው አበረታቱት።
pages.textEn: The little rabbit offered to go and practiced the name as a song.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A little rabbit starting a journey while animal friends encourage him.

pages.textAm: በመንገድ ላይ ነፋስ ነፈሰ፣ አቧራም በቀስታ ተነሳ። ጥንቸሉ ግን “አልረሳም፣ በቀስታ እደግመዋለሁ” ብሎ ዜማውን ቀጠለ።
pages.textEn: Wind blew on the path, but the rabbit kept repeating the song.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The little rabbit walking through soft wind while remembering the song.

pages.textAm: አንድ ወፍ በደስታ ስትዘምር ጥንቸሉ ለመጫወት ቆመ። ከዚያ በኋላ ስሙን ትንሽ ረሳው፣ ግን ተቀምጦ በጥሞና አሰበ።
pages.textEn: A bird's song distracted him, but he sat quietly and remembered.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The rabbit sitting calmly under a small tree, thinking carefully.

pages.textAm: “ዜማውን ከመጀመሪያ እንደገና እቆጥራለሁ” አለ። በቀስታ በቀስታ ስሙ ወደ ልቡ ተመለሰ።
pages.textEn: He began the song again, and the name came back to him.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The rabbit smiling as he remembers the tree name again.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ ወደ ልዩ ዛፉ ደረሰ። ዛፉ ረጅም ነበር፣ ቅጠሎቹም በፀሐይ ብርሃን ይንቀሳቀሱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The rabbit reached the special tree shining in the sun.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A special tall fruit tree glowing gently in sunlight as the rabbit arrives.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ የዛፉን ስም በግልጽ ድምፅ አለ። ዛፉ ቅርንጫፎቹን አንቀሳቅሶ ጣፋጭ ፍሬዎችን በቀስታ አወረደ።
pages.textEn: The rabbit said the name, and the tree gently shared fruit.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tree gently lowering fruit for the little rabbit.

pages.textAm: እንስሳቱ ፍሬውን ተካፈሉ፣ ስሙንም እንዳይረሱ በየቀኑ ዘፈኑ። ጥበብን ማዳመጥ እና ማስታወስ ሁሉንም እንደሚረዳ ተማሩ።
pages.textEn: The animals shared the fruit and sang the name together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Animals sharing fruit together under the wise tree, warm and joyful.
